testcase.name: getCustomerBasicInfo4
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [{"Customer":[{"CustomerId":"AUTO1001","CustomerType":{"Id":1,"Description":"Individual"},"CustomerClass":{"Id":"","Description":""},"Name":{"Title":{"Id":"2","Description":"Mr."},"FirstName":"Auto","MiddleName":"","LastName":"Former","NameSuffix":"","MaidenName":""},"PlaceOfWork":{"Value":"","IsDirty":false},"PrimaryLanguage":"","EmailAddress":"","SSN":{"Value":"","IsDirty":false},"DateOfBirth":{"Value":"1970-03-03","IsDirty":false},"AlternateId":{"Value":"","IssuedBy":"","Country":"USA","IsDirty":false},"BusinessAs":"","Inactive":false,"Confirm":0,"Success":true,"Messages":[{"Enabled":0,"Info":""}]}]}] but found [{"Customer":[{"CustomerId":"AUTO1001","CustomerType":{"Id":1,"Description":"Individual"},"CustomerClass":{"Id":"","Description":""},"Name":{"Title":{"Id":"2","Description":"Mr."},"FirstName":"Auto","MiddleName":"","LastName":"Former","NameSuffix":"","MaidenName":""},"PlaceOfWork":{"Value":"","IsDirty":false},"PrimaryLanguage":"","EmailAddress":"","SSN":{"Value":"","IsDirty":false},"DateOfBirth":{"Value":"1970-03-03","IsDirty":false},"AlternateId":{"Value":"","IssuedBy":"","Country":"CANADA","IsDirty":false},"BusinessAs":"","Inactive":false,"Confirm":0,"Success":true,"Messages":[{"Enabled":0,"Info":""}]}]}]
